---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?
     Example: "As a Rails developer using Stockerly, I need to..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can about
     the interface — endpoint shape, CLI flag, config variable, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds or other approaches did you consider?
     Why is this the right solution? -->

## Scope

<!-- Rough sense of the change:
     - New provider? New endpoint? Config option? Dashboard feature?
     - Breaking change to the API contract?
     - Expected impact on existing consumers. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links, related issues, or anything else useful. -->
